name: Guidance
description: You touch one willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to one ability check of its choice. It can roll the die before or after making the ability check.
effect: Target gains a +1d4 bonus to one ability check of their choice before the spell ends.
notes: Touch range; concentration lasts up to 1 minute
Bonus applies to ability checks (skills, tool checks) — not attack rolls or saves
